steps.name: core-types
steps.summary: src/types/{nexon-wire,scheduler,character,auth,index}.ts 추가 — wire 타입(NexonCharacterListResponse, NexonSchedulerCharacterStateWire 등)과 domain 타입(BOSS_DIFFICULTIES, BOSS_CYCLES, SchedulerCharacterState, MapleAccount, NexonAuthConfig 등) 분리 정의, scheduler.test.ts로 검증
